listening.title: Listening: Learning English
listening.transcript: I started learning English when I was ten years old. I wanted to travel one day. I studied for about five hours every week.

questions.question: Started learning English at age: ___
questions.explanation: "I started learning English when I was ten years old."

listening.title: Listening: Explaining what happened
listening.transcript: I didn't go to the meeting yesterday. I didn't have any time. I told my manager, but he wasn't angry about it.
